zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Umfraville於大約1321年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Robert Umfraville46歲，母親Eleanor Lumley33歲。他於大約1360年與Joan de Roddam結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年5月21日在英國諾圖波藍德哈波特爾享年67歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Umfraville于大约1321年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Robert Umfraville46岁，母亲Eleanor Lumley33岁。他于大约1360年与Joan de Roddam结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年5月21日在英国諾圖波藍德哈波特爾享年67岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯。

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Umfraville was born about 1321, in Northumberland, England, his father, Robert Umfraville, was 46 and his mother, Eleanor Lumley, was 33. He married Joan de Roddam about 1360. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 May 1387, in Harbottle, Northumberland, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Umfraville est né environ 1321, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert Umfraville, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Lumley, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Roddam environ 1360. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 mai 1387, à Harbottle, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Umfraville um 1321 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Umfraville 46 und seine Mutter Eleanor Lumley 33. Er hat um 1360 Joan de Roddam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Mai 1387 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Harbottle, Northumberland, England und wurde in Morpeth, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Umfraville è nato il circa 1321 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Robert Umfraville, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Lumley, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Roddam circa 1360. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 maggio 1387, nel Harbottle, Northumberland, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Umfravilleが約1321年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Robert Umfravilleは46歳，母Eleanor Lumleyは33歳であった。約1360年にJoan de Roddamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年5月21日にイギリスノースウンバーランドハーボットルで67歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Umfraville(이)가 대략 1321년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Umfraville(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Lumley(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1360년 Joan de Roddam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 5월 21일 영국 노르스벌랜드 하르벗틀에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에 묻혔다.

mn.Northumberland, England: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Umfraville nasceu aproximadamente 1321, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Umfraville, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Lumley, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Roddam aproximadamente 1360. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de maio de 1387, em Harbottle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Umfraville родился около 1321 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Umfraville было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Lumley, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Roddam около 1360 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 мая 1387 г. в местности харботтл, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Umfraville nació aproximadamente 1321, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Umfraville, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Eleanor Lumley, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Joan de Roddam aproximadamente 1360. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1387, en Harbottle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
